body.p: The MarkLogic EXPath Console ML EXPath Console on GitHub is a web application that provides various views of the data outside of the MarkLogic server. It also includes some practical tools, such as:
Within the scope of this reading, only the browser will be briefly introduced, because it allows you to inspect the data in a straightforward way.
The data is displayed in an editor window with syntax highlighting.

messagepanel.typeofhazard: Viewing large amounts of data is not possible with the EXPath Browser due to performance reasons.
messagepanel.howtoavoid: The author explicitly points out this limitation. The application should not be used in production, but is intended for development purposes.

body.p: After installation, the EXPath Console runs by default on port 8010. Via the Databases tab, you can view the defined databases:

fig.title: Database View in the EXPath Explorer for MarkLogic
fig.desc: Via the Databases tab, you reach the database view. Here you can select individual directories using the Browse button.

body.p: Via a file path, you reach the data view with syntax highlighting.

fig.title: Data View with Syntax Highlighting in the EXPath Console for MarkLogic

messagepanel.typeofhazard: The EXPath Console expects MarkLogic to run on the standard ports. That is [[code:8001]] for the admin application. If this is not the case, an installation using the tool [[link]]mlproj[[fn:http://mlproj.org/*Project and Environment Manager for MarkLogic]] will fail.
messagepanel.howtoavoid: How to correct this issue can certainly be inquired via the project page on GitHub. Since I reset MarkLogic from a non-standard port back to the standard port for other reasons, I skipped this option.
